Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protege car la BCM ne repond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifie la cle ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monte sur le vehicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protege car la BCM n'envoie pas la cle secrete: l'ECM n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisee a envoyer la cle secrete
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotege" et n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a detecte une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

Label.Text: These values must be entered manually before being rewritten.
- The button "RESET" can write the initialization values of a component following the change of it.
The values are automatically initialized when pressing the button, no input is required.
In the following screens you will find two buttons: Writing and reset.
- After reprogramming or changing a calculator button "WRITE" lets rewrite the previously saved values.

Label.Text: Readiness code completion PID 1 octet A + B
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet C + D
DATA BYTE B: On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests
DATA BYTE D: Status of tests run at least once per trip
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet B BIT B5/B6 - octet D BIT B7
DATABYTE B, BIT 6: CC monitoring readiness
DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 3: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
Test complete or not applicable = 0 soit diag joue
Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joue
DATA BYTE A: Number of DTC and MIL lamp status
Number of memorized emission-related powertrain failures
DATABYTE B, BIT 5: Fuel system monitoring readiness
DATA BYTE C: Supported tests run at least once per trip
Supported tests run at least once per trip
Particle filter regeneration need diagnostic-Test value $F621
